title: Attack Pattern Beta
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Beta}}
'''Attack Pattern Beta''' was a tactic used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeders]] and [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|Alpha-3 ''Nimbus''-class V-wing starfighters]] in battle.

{{Military-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', clicking on a snowspeeder might make him announce "Attack Pattern Beta!"

In [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']], at the start of the second mission, [[Mace Windu]] orders [[Luminara Unduli]] to use Attack Pattern Beta.

In ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'', one of the things that a V-wing pilot may say while fighting other starfighters is "Commence with attack pattern Beta!"

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
